name: search_modules
description: Search the merchant's Super App AI modules by name and/or status. Returns each module with its type, status (DRAFT or PUBLISHED), category, latest version, and last-updated time. Use to answer questions like 'what modules do I have', 'which of my modules are still drafts', or 'find my spin-to-win popup'.

query.description: Optional case-insensitive substring to match against the module name. Omit to list all modules.

status.description: Filter by publish status. ANY returns both drafts and published modules.

name: get_module_performance
description: Get a Super App AI module's performance over the last N days: impressions, interactions, actions, conversions, and conversion rate, plus a per-day breakdown. Use to answer 'how is my <module> performing'. If no analytics have been recorded yet the result reports that instead of showing zeros.

moduleId.description: The id of the module to report on, e.g. from a search_modules result.

days.description: How many days of history to summarize (1-90).
